twitter_posts.title: I still sometimes see people saying "if you know how to write the code, it's faster to write it yourself" I'd argue the exact opposite: if you know how to write it, you gain nothing from doing the typ
twitter_posts.description:
I still sometimes see people saying "if you know how to write the code, it's faster to write it yourself"

I'd argue the exact opposite: if you know how to write it, you gain nothing from doing the typing yourself - outsource that to a coding agent!
twitter_posts.author: Simon Willison
